title: rubus crebrisetus
intro: Rubus crebrisetus, also known as the Himalayan raspberry or Himalayan bramble, is a species of flowering plant in the genus Rubus. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its astringent, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties, which are attributed to the presence of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Rubus crebrisetus include its potential to help reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and support the immune system, as well as its traditional use to treat various ailments such as fever and diarrhea. Rubus crebrisetus is often used in herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be prepared by steeping the leaves, stems, or roots in hot water or a solvent like ethanol.
